dialogos.texto_en: (...Yesterday's incident\n has left me a bit sleep-deprived.)
(Maybe Nino is also feeling anxious and restless\n because of my incompetence.)
(So, should I just go for the kiss today...?!\n But I should be the one showing initiative, not Nino!)
(However, I shouldn't be too aggressive, right?\n I should create a situation\n where it feels natural kissing her%p-2;――%p;)
Hey, good morning, big bro.
H-hey. Good morning.\nMorning to you too, Itsuki.
Good morning.
Big bro, you seem a bit down. What's wrong?
No, nothing's wrong.
...Good morning, Futaro.
G-good morning.\nBy the way... Did you sleep well?
Yeah, I slept just fine.\nBut you're looking sleep-deprived.
What happened? Futaro-kun, you didn't get enough sleep?
N-no, not at all.\nI slept well last night! I was really tired!
Hmm, is that so...?
Is there something you wanted to say?
No, no, nothing at all.
(She's saying that, but\n she's clearly giving me the side eye.)
(Actually nothing happened. I don't need to be nervous!)
Goood mooorniiing!
Morning.\nIs today our last day?
Yes, it is.\nIchika woke up early today, too.
That's right.\nAs I felt some lovey-doveyness in the air.
Huh?
Are you saying, Uesugi-san and Nino used their \nlovey-dovey powers to wake up Ichika?
No, I didn't use any powers to wake her up!\nNow, instead of talking nonsense,\nlet's check our schedule for today!
Today, we're going to spend the whole day at the beach.
Yay! We can finally swim in the BEAUTIFUL Okinawan sea!
And for lunch, we'll have a barbecue on the beach!
Does that mean we need to go shopping for ingredients\nbefore we go swimming?\nAnd what about the tools?
No, we dont need anything. We signed up for the hotel's \nactivity plan, so we can go empty-handed.
Huh? We don't need anything?
Yes, they will prepare everything we need.
Really? That's so convenient!
Isn't it too snobby to leave everything to them?\nAre you sure it's okay?\nWill we at least clean up afterwards?
Don't worry about it.\nLet's indulge ourselves a little.\nIt's our graduation trip, right?
Alright, then let's enjoy ourselves\nto the fullest, Raiha!
Okay!
Teehee!\nYou two are always so over-the-top.
Button it, leave us alone.\nWe're not used to this kind of luxury.
But it's good that Futaro-kun is feeling better.\nIt seems like as if he had a good night's rest.
Ichikaaa?\nYou need to stop bothering us already.
Okay.
Um, did something happen?
Nothing happened.\nYep. NOTHING.
